soviet_collapse_select_foreign_patron_target = {
	for_each_scope_loop = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
		if = {
			limit = { exists = yes }
			clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_patron_selected_target
		}
	}
	FROM = {
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_patron_selected_target
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_country = ROOT.id }
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_country value = soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_country compare = equals }
			}
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence }
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_hide_foreign_patron_target = {
	FROM = {
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_patron_selected_target
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_country = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_cleanup_resolved_breakaway_target = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway }
		remove_from_array = { array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries value = THIS }
		add_to_variable = { global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = -1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.any_breakaway_count compare = less_than } }
			set_variable = { global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.any_breakaway_count }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } }
			SOV = {
				add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = -1 }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.any_breakaway_count compare = less_than } }
					set_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.any_breakaway_count }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_corridor_open
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_support_received
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_protection_treaty_signed
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_adviser_privileges_granted
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_client_cabinet_installed
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_dominant_sponsor_warning
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_dominant_sponsor_lock
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_two
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_three
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_patron_selected_target
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_country = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_country = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_unbucketed_sponsor_influence = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_protection_treaty_sponsor_country = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_adviser_privileges_sponsor_country = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	if = { limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } } SOV = { soviet_collapse_prune_invalid_active_soviet_objectives = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_follow_on_breakaway_pressure = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			SOV = {
				exists = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_active = yes
				NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_wave_active }
				NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse_in_progress }
			}
		}
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.republic_confidence }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.depot_vulnerability }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.league_cohesion }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.foreign_appetite }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			if = {
				limit = { PREV = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
				add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.major_republic_confidence }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { PREV = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_regional_target = yes } }
				add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.regional_republic_confidence }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
				add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.cascade_league_cohesion }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_follow_on_release.cascade_foreign_appetite }
				soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			}
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_entry = {
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_event_id = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.event_id }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_type = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.secession_evolution_type }
	if = {
		limit = { OR = { is_current_evolution_enabled = yes has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_triggerable_scenario_include_chaos } }
		record_events_log_evolution_entry = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_milestones = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_first_wave_recorded }
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.first_wave_breakaway_floor
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_tier = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.first_wave_tier }
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.first_wave_stage }
		soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_entry = yes
		set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_first_wave_recorded
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_regional_cascade_recorded }
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.regional_cascade_breakaway_floor
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_tier = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.regional_cascade_tier }
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.regional_cascade_stage }
		soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_entry = yes
		set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_regional_cascade_recorded
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_union_unmade_recorded }
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_super_event_union_unmade_fired
		}
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_tier = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.union_unmade_tier }
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.union_unmade_stage }
		soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_entry = yes
		set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_union_unmade_recorded
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_world_collapse_recorded }
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_super_event_union_unmade_fired
			has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_tier = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.world_collapse_tier }
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_event_log.world_collapse_stage }
		soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_entry = yes
		set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_evolution_world_collapse_recorded
	}
}

soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } }
		soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_setup_package = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_set_breakaway_category_display_values = {
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_member_gate = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.local_league_member_quorum }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_recognition_gate = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.large_recognition_gain }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_threat_gate = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.league_threat_gate }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_foreign_gate = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.high_foreign_appetite_gate }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_failed_objective_gate = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.failure_floor }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_found_pp_cost = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.found_political_power }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_found_cp_cost = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.found_command_power }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_setup_package = {
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway
	soviet_collapse_apply_event_created_republic_council_leader = yes
	soviet_collapse_set_breakaway_category_display_values = yes
	add_to_array = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
		value = THIS
	}
	add_to_variable = { global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = 1 }
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } }
		SOV = {
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = 1 }
			if = {
				limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_wave_active }

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_wave_active

				}
				add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_opening_pressure.first_wave_major_republic_confidence }
			}
			if = {

				}
				add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_opening_pressure.first_wave_regional_republic_confidence }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_wave_active }
				soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			}
			PREV = { soviet_collapse_apply_follow_on_breakaway_pressure = yes }
			soviet_collapse_maybe_show_union_unmade_super_event = yes
			soviet_collapse_record_secession_evolution_milestones = yes
		}
	}

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_manpower_package = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.base_manpower }

	add_manpower = var:soviet_collapse_breakaway_manpower_package

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_cooldown_days = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_recipient_cooldown_days }

				flag = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_recent

			}
		}
		AID_COOLDOWN_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_cooldown_days|.0]"
	}
}

		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_liaison_recognition = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_recognition_bonus }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_intelligence_recognition = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_recognition_bonus }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_volunteer_recognition = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_recognition_bonus }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_trade_recognition = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_recognition_bonus }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_recognition = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_recognition_bonus }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_league = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_league_bonus }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_local_authority = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_support.timeout_aid_major_local_authority_bonus }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_volunteer_aid_recipient = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_volunteer_cooldown_days = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_target_cooldown_days }
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			set_country_flag = {
				flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_volunteers_recent
				days = [VOLUNTEER_COOLDOWN_DAYS]
			}
		}
		VOLUNTEER_COOLDOWN_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_foreign_volunteer_cooldown_days|.0]"
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_timeout_fuel_aid_to_random_breakaway = {
	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_grant_timeout_aid = yes }
		random_scope_in_array = {
			array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
			limit = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_recent } }
			soviet_collapse_prepare_timeout_aid_package = yes
			add_fuel = var:soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_fuel
			soviet_collapse_mark_timeout_aid_recipient = yes
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_register_timeout_aid_grant = yes }
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_timeout_infantry_artillery_aid_to_random_breakaway = {
	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_grant_timeout_aid = yes }
		random_scope_in_array = {
			array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
			limit = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_recent } }
			soviet_collapse_prepare_timeout_aid_package = yes
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = var:soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_infantry }
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = artillery_equipment_1 amount = var:soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_artillery }
			soviet_collapse_mark_timeout_aid_recipient = yes
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_register_timeout_aid_grant = yes }
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_timeout_ukraine_depot_aid = {
	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_grant_timeout_aid = yes }
		if = {
			limit = { UKR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_recent } } }
			UKR = {
				soviet_collapse_prepare_timeout_aid_package = yes
				add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = var:soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_infantry }
				add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = var:soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_support }
				add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_league }
				soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
				soviet_collapse_mark_timeout_aid_recipient = yes
				SOV = { soviet_collapse_register_timeout_aid_grant = yes }
			}
		}
	}
}

				OR = {
					tag = UKR

soviet_collapse_apply_timeout_mountain_signal_aid_to_random_breakaway = {
	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_grant_timeout_aid = yes }
		random_scope_in_array = {
			array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway
				NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_recent }
				OR = {
					tag = KYR
					tag = TAJ
					tag = KAZ
				}
			}
			soviet_collapse_prepare_timeout_aid_package = yes
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_liaison_recognition }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_league }
			soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
			soviet_collapse_mark_timeout_aid_recipient = yes
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_register_timeout_aid_grant = yes }
		}
	}
}

		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_grant_timeout_aid = yes }

			array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries

				tag = KAZ
			}
			soviet_collapse_prepare_timeout_aid_package = yes
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_league }
			soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = var:soviet_collapse_timeout_aid_infantry }
			soviet_collapse_mark_timeout_aid_recipient = yes
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_register_timeout_aid_grant = yes }
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_check_republic_recovery = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_republic_recovery_progress
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_recovery.partial_recovery
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
		}
		swap_ideas = {
			remove_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder
			add_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder_mitigated
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_republic_startup_disorder_mitigated
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder
				has_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder_mitigated
			}
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_republic_recovery_progress
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_recovery.recovery_complete
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = { limit = { has_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder } remove_ideas = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder }
			if = { limit = { has_idea = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder_mitigated } remove_ideas = soviet_collapse_republican_startup_disorder_mitigated }
		}
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_emergency_administration_stabilized
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_decision_gain }
		soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_republic_startup_disorder_resolved
	}
}

soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_recovery_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_recovery.decision_progress }
	soviet_collapse_check_republic_recovery = yes
}

soviet_collapse_add_republic_focus_recovery_progress = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_recovery_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_recovery.focus_progress }
	soviet_collapse_check_republic_recovery = yes
}

soviet_collapse_set_breakaway_source_pressure_caps = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.preterminal_breakaway_source_republic_month_cap }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.preterminal_breakaway_source_depot_month_cap }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.preterminal_breakaway_source_league_month_cap }
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_union_unmade_first_month_lock
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_pressure_initialized
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_opening_release_emergency = yes }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.opening_lock_breakaway_source_republic_month_cap }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.opening_lock_breakaway_source_depot_month_cap }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.opening_lock_breakaway_source_league_month_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_strong_center_facts = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.calm_threat_ceiling compare = less_than }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_release_level_component_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 } }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.calm_breakaway_source_republic_month_cap }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.calm_breakaway_source_depot_month_cap }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.calm_breakaway_source_league_month_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_authority compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.contested_component_cap_breakaway_gate compare = less_than }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.moderate_threat_ceiling compare = less_than }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 } }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.moderate_breakaway_source_republic_month_cap }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.moderate_breakaway_source_depot_month_cap }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.moderate_breakaway_source_league_month_cap }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = {
	soviet_collapse_set_breakaway_source_pressure_caps = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta value = 0 compare = greater_than } }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_confidence = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_republic_pressure = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_republic_pressure value = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap compare = greater_than } }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_republic_pressure }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap }
			subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_confidence = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap }
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_republic_pressure = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta value = 0 compare = less_than } }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_confidence = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta value = 0 compare = greater_than } }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_vulnerability = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_depot_pressure = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_depot_pressure value = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap compare = greater_than } }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_depot_pressure }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap }
			subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_vulnerability = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap }
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_depot_pressure = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta value = 0 compare = less_than } }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_vulnerability = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta value = 0 compare = greater_than } }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_cohesion = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_league_pressure = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_league_pressure value = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap compare = greater_than } }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_league_pressure }
			subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap }
			subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_cohesion = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap }
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_breakaway_league_pressure = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta value = 0 compare = less_than } }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_cohesion = soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta }
	}
	soviet_collapse_clamp_crisis_components = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_cap = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_cap = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_cap = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_over_cap = 0 }
	soviet_collapse_recalculate_total_threat = yes
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_recognition_request = {
	add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.recognition_stability_spend
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.recognition_progress }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_decision_gain }
	soviet_collapse_apply_internal_compact_recognition_bonus = yes
	soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.recognition_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.recognition_soviet_republic_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_mobilization = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.mobilize_political_power_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.mobilize_command_power_spend
	add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.mobilize_manpower
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.mobilize_infantry_equipment }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.military_focus_gain }
	soviet_collapse_apply_internal_compact_mobilization_bonus = yes
	soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_mobilize_unit_count = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.mobilize_unit_count }
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			capital_scope = {
				create_unit = {
					division = "division_template = \"Emergency Republican Guard\" start_experience_factor = 0.2 start_equipment_factor = 0.85"
					owner = PREV
					count = [UNIT_COUNT]
				}
			}
		}
		UNIT_COUNT = "[?soviet_collapse_mobilize_unit_count|.0]"
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_depot_seizure = {
	army_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.seize_depot_army_xp_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.seize_command_power_spend
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.seize_infantry_equipment }
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.seize_support_equipment }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.seize_depot_control }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.depot_focus_gain }
	soviet_collapse_apply_internal_compact_depot_bonus = yes
	soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.seize_soviet_depot_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_front_coordination = {
	add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.coordinate_fuel_spend
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.coordinate_support_equipment_spend }
	soviet_collapse_apply_internal_compact_front_bonus = yes
	for_each_scope_loop = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway
			}
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.coordinate_recognition_progress }
			soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
			soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.coordinate_league_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_high_chaos_offensive = {
	add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_fuel_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_command_power_spend
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_support_equipment_spend }
	add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_manpower
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_infantry_equipment }
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_offensive_launched
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_offensive_unit_count = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_unit_count }
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			capital_scope = {
				create_unit = {
					division = "division_template = \"Emergency Republican Guard\" start_experience_factor = 0.25 start_equipment_factor = 0.9"
					owner = PREV
					count = [UNIT_COUNT]
				}
			}
		}
		UNIT_COUNT = "[?soviet_collapse_offensive_unit_count|.0]"
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			SOV = { exists = yes }
			NOT = { has_war_with = SOV }
			can_declare_war_on = SOV
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = SOV
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_soviet_republic_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_soviet_depot_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_obedience_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_breakaway_action.offensive_soviet_obedience_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_internal_compact_recognition_bonus = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_internal_compact_payoff_surface = yes
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_internal_compact_recognition_bonus_used }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_internal_compact_recognition_bonus_used
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.recognition_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.institution_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.league_gain }
		add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.stability_gain
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_internal_black_sea_compact_observers
					has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_internal_neighbor_oaths
					has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_internal_free_republics_wire
				}
			}
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.liaison_gain }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
			SOV = {
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.soviet_foreign_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_internal_compact.soviet_league_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_influence_delta = {
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.major_target_priority_influence_bonus }
		FROM = {
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.major_target_priority_resilience_bonus }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.major_target_priority_patronage_risk_relief }
		}
	}
	FROM = {
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_delta }
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_country value = ROOT.id compare = equals }
			}
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_delta }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = less_than_or_equals }
			}
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_country = ROOT.id }
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_delta }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_delta value = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than }
			}
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_country = ROOT.id }
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_delta }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_country value = ROOT.id compare = equals }
			}
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_delta }
			clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		}
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	if = { limit = { tag = GER } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_germany = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = ENG } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_britain = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = JAP } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_japan = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = FRA } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_france = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = USA } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_usa = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = TUR } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_turkey = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = PER } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_iran = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = POL } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_poland = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = ROM } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_romania = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = FIN } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_finland = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = SWE } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_sweden = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = { limit = { tag = ITA } FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_italy = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_active } }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_named_sponsor_bucket_applied value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = less_than_or_equals }
		}
		FROM = { add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_unbucketed_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_delta } }
	}
	FROM = {
		soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = yes
		soviet_collapse_update_sponsor_balance_pressure = yes
		soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_recompute_foreign_influence_total = {
	soviet_collapse_ensure_republic_country_component_variables = yes
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = 0 }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_germany }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_britain }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_japan }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_france }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_usa }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_iran }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_poland }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_romania }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_finland }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_italy }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_unbucketed_sponsor_influence }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = soviet_collapse_influence_moscow }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_total min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_republic_strength_influence_decay = {
	soviet_collapse_ensure_republic_country_component_variables = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_base }
	if = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_major_target }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { num_divisions > constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_medium_divisions }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_medium_army }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { num_divisions > constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_large_divisions }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_large_army }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_resilience_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_decay_resilient_republic }
	}
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_germany = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_britain = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_japan = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_france = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_usa = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_turkey = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_iran = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_poland = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_romania = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_finland = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_sweden = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_italy = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_unbucketed_sponsor_influence value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_unbucketed_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than } } subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence = soviet_collapse_foreign_influence_decay } }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_unbucketed_sponsor_influence min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_dynamic_sponsor_influence min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_selected_foreign_patron_influence min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = yes
	soviet_collapse_recompute_foreign_influence_total = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_sponsor_balance_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = yes
}

soviet_collapse_apply_monthly_foreign_influence_decay = {
	for_each_scope_loop = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_total value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.influence_positive_floor compare = greater_than }
			}
			soviet_collapse_apply_republic_strength_influence_decay = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_update_sponsor_balance_pressure = {
	soviet_collapse_ensure_republic_country_component_variables = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_germany }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_germany }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_britain }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_britain }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_japan }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_japan }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_france }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_france }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_usa }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_usa }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_iran }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_iran }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_poland }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_poland }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_romania }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_romania }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_finland }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_finland }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_sponsor_floor compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count = 1 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy value = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_italy }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy value = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence compare = greater_than } }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence = soviet_collapse_influence_italy }
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_gap = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_gap = soviet_collapse_second_foreign_sponsor_influence }
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_three
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count value = 3 compare = less_than }
		}
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_three
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_three_resilience_remove }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_three_patronage_risk_remove }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_two
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count value = 2 compare = less_than }
		}
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_two
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_two_resilience_remove }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_two_patronage_risk_remove }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_two }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_two
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_two_resilience }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_two_patronage_risk }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_three }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_balanced_sponsors_three
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_three_resilience }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.balanced_three_patronage_risk }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_dominant_sponsor_warning }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_warning_influence compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_gap value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_warning_gap compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_dominant_sponsor_warning
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_warning_patronage_risk }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_warning_resilience }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_dominant_sponsor_lock }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_top_foreign_sponsor_influence value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_lock_influence compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_gap value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_lock_gap compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_dominant_sponsor_lock
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_lock_patronage_risk }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.dominant_lock_resilience }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_ensure_republic_country_component_variables = {
	if = { limit = { NOT = { has_variable = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress } } set_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { NOT = { has_variable = soviet_collapse_influence_total } } set_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_total = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { NOT = { has_variable = soviet_collapse_influence_germany } } set_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_germany = 0 } }
