soviet_collapse_apply_republic_progress_pacing_caps = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			SOV = {
				exists = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_active = yes
				NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse }
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
				NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 } }
				NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_months_active value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_months compare = less_than }
			}
		}
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_recognition_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_total min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_influence_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_patronage_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_liaison_reach min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_liaison_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_institution_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_control min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_depot_control_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_league_support_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_local_authority_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.opening_resilience_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			SOV = {
				exists = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_active = yes
				NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse }
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
				NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_months_active value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_months compare = less_than }
			}
		}
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_recognition_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_total min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_influence_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_sponsor_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_patronage_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_liaison_reach min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_liaison_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_institution_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_control min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_depot_control_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_league_support_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_local_authority_cap }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_progress_guard.early_resilience_cap }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = {
	soviet_collapse_ensure_republic_country_component_variables = yes
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_total min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_germany min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_britain min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_japan min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_france min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_usa min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_turkey min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_iran min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_poland min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_romania min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_finland min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_sweden min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_italy min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_moscow min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_control min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_liaison_reach min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	soviet_collapse_apply_republic_progress_pacing_caps = yes
}

soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = {
	soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_sponsor_balance_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_clamp_republic_country_components = yes
	hidden_effect = {
		soviet_collapse_clear_republic_staged_ideas = yes
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_support_strength = soviet_collapse_influence_total }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_strength_bonus = soviet_collapse_active_foreign_sponsor_count }
	multiply_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_strength_bonus value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.foreign_sponsor_stage_bonus }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_support_strength = soviet_collapse_foreign_sponsor_strength_bonus }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_material_support_strength = soviet_collapse_influence_arms_total }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_material_support_strength = soviet_collapse_influence_logistics_total }
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_4 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_institutions_4
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_3 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_institutions_3
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_2 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_institutions_2
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_1 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_institutions_1
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_4 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_league_coordination_4
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_3 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_league_coordination_3
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_2 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_league_coordination_2
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_1 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_league_coordination_1
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_support_received }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.stage_4_threshold compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
			add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_foreign_support_4
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.stage_3_threshold compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
			add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_foreign_support_3
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.stage_2_threshold compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
			add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_foreign_support_2
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_support_strength value = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.stage_1_threshold compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
			add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_foreign_support_1
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_4 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_local_authority_pressure_4
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_3 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_local_authority_pressure_3
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_2 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_local_authority_pressure_2
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.stage_1 compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		add_ideas = soviet_collapse_republic_local_authority_pressure_1
	}
}

soviet_collapse_reduce_republic_league_support = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_republic_league_coordination = yes }
		subtract_from_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_gain }
		clamp_variable = {
			var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength
			min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
			max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max
		}
		soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_update_foreign_investment_stage_ideas = {
	soviet_collapse_update_sponsor_balance_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
}

soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_recognition_aid = {
	if = { limit = { has_government = democratic } set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_democratic_patron_contest_completed }
	if = { limit = { has_war_with = SOV } set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_hostile_patron_double_game }
	soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_general_aid_sponsor = yes
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_political_power_spend
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = convoy_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_convoy_spend }
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_regional_target = yes } }
		add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_regional_political_power_extra_spend
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = convoy_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_regional_convoy_extra_spend }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
		add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_major_political_power_extra_spend
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = convoy_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_major_convoy_extra_spend }
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.recognition_influence }
	soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_influence_delta = yes
	FROM = {
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_general_aid_recipient = yes
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_progress }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_recognition_total = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.recognition_influence }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_decision_gain }
		soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
		soviet_collapse_update_foreign_investment_stage_ideas = yes
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_recognition_news_reported } }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_recognition_news_reported
			news_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.49 }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_secondary_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_soviet_republic_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.recognition_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_secondary_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_liaison_aid = {
	if = { limit = { has_government = democratic } set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_democratic_patron_contest_completed }
	if = { limit = { has_war_with = SOV } set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_hostile_patron_double_game }

	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_political_power_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_command_power_spend

		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_regional_target = yes } }
		add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_regional_political_power_extra_spend
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_regional_command_power_extra_spend
	}
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
		add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_major_political_power_extra_spend
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_major_command_power_extra_spend
	}
	if = { limit = { has_government = communism } FROM = { add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_ideology_popularity } } }
	if = { limit = { has_government = democratic } FROM = { add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_ideology_popularity } } }
	if = { limit = { has_government = fascism } FROM = { add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_ideology_popularity } } }
	if = { limit = { has_government = neutrality } FROM = { add_popularity = { ideology = neutrality popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_ideology_popularity } } }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.liaison_ideology_influence }
	soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_influence_delta = yes
	FROM = {
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_general_aid_recipient = yes
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_recognition_progress }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_ideology_total = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.liaison_ideology_influence }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.liaison_patronage_risk }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_decision_gain }
		soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
		soviet_collapse_update_foreign_investment_stage_ideas = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_regional_target = yes } }

		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_regional_support_equipment_extra_spend }

		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_major_infantry_equipment_extra_spend }
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_major_support_equipment_extra_spend }

		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_major_aid_recipient = yes
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_target_infantry_equipment producer = ROOT }
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_target_support_equipment producer = ROOT }

		soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
		soviet_collapse_update_foreign_investment_stage_ideas = yes
	}

		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_secondary_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_soviet_depot_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.armaments_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_secondary_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}

		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_regional_target = yes } }

		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_regional_infantry_equipment_extra_spend }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
		add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_major_manpower_extra_spend
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_major_infantry_equipment_extra_spend }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.volunteers_influence }
	soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_influence_delta = yes
	FROM = {
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_general_aid_recipient = yes
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_major_aid_recipient = yes
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_volunteer_aid_recipient = yes
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_volunteer_unit_count = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_target_unit_count }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				capital_scope = {
					create_unit = {
						division = "division_template = \"Emergency Republican Field Brigade\" start_experience_factor = 0.3 start_equipment_factor = 0.9"
						owner = PREV
						count = [VOLUNTEER_UNIT_COUNT]
					}
				}
			}
			VOLUNTEER_UNIT_COUNT = "[?soviet_collapse_foreign_volunteer_unit_count|.0]"
		}
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_recognition_progress }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_volunteers_total = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.volunteers_influence }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.volunteers_patronage_risk }
		soviet_collapse_add_republic_decision_recovery_progress = yes
		soviet_collapse_update_foreign_investment_stage_ideas = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_secondary_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_soviet_republic_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.volunteers_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_secondary_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}

	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.civilian_construction_industry_influence }
	soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_influence_delta = yes

		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_general_aid_recipient = yes
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_major_aid_recipient = yes
		soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_construction_aid_recipient = yes

			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1

		}
		random_owned_controlled_state = {

		}

	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_command_power_spend
	add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_fuel_spend
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_regional_target = yes } }
		add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_regional_political_power_extra_spend
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_regional_command_power_extra_spend
		add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_regional_fuel_extra_spend
	}
	if = {
		limit = { FROM = { is_soviet_collapse_foreign_aid_major_target = yes } }
		add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_major_political_power_extra_spend
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_major_command_power_extra_spend
		add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_major_fuel_extra_spend
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.protection_treaty_influence }
	soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_influence_delta = yes
	soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_dependency_sponsor = yes
		FROM = {
			soviet_collapse_mark_foreign_dependency_recipient = yes
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_protection_treaty_signed
			set_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_protection_treaty_sponsor_country = ROOT.id }
			add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_puppet_pressure.protection_treaty_stability
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_recognition_total = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.protection_treaty_influence }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.protection_treaty_patronage_risk }
			soviet_collapse_update_foreign_investment_stage_ideas = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
			SOV = {
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.protection_treaty_soviet_foreign_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_patron_pressure_delta = yes
			}
		}
	}

		}
		if = {

			}
		}
	}

		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_old_movement_delta = ukr_soviet_collapse_bread_state_old_movement_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.soviet_depot_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
	set_temp_variable = { ukr_soviet_collapse_bread_state_old_movement_pressure = 0 }
}

	hidden_effect = { ukr_soviet_collapse_pay_black_soil_committees_cost = yes }
	set_temp_variable = { ukr_soviet_collapse_grain_authority_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.grain_authority_medium }
	ukr_soviet_collapse_add_grain_authority = yes
	set_temp_variable = { ukr_soviet_collapse_bread_state_coercion_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.coercion_small }
	ukr_soviet_collapse_add_bread_state_coercion = yes
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.resilience_gain }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.depot_gain }
	add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.coercion_stability
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		limit = { is_core_of = ROOT }
		add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = @soviet_collapse_ukr_bread_state_building_level instant_build = yes }
		add_building_construction = { type = bunker level = @soviet_collapse_ukr_bread_state_fort_level instant_build = yes }
	}
	set_temp_variable = { ukr_soviet_collapse_bread_state_old_movement_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_ukraine_bread_state.soviet_old_movement_small }
	ukr_soviet_collapse_apply_bread_state_soviet_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
}

mol_soviet_collapse_apply_route_soviet_pressure = {
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_depot_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_league_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_old_movement_delta = mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_old_movement_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
	set_temp_variable = { mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_depot_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_league_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_old_movement_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { mol_soviet_collapse_route_soviet_foreign_pressure = 0 }
}

central_asia_soviet_collapse_add_league_score = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_central_asia_league_score = central_asia_soviet_collapse_league_score_delta }
	clamp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_central_asia_league_score
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.league_score_cap
	}
	set_temp_variable = { central_asia_soviet_collapse_league_score_delta = 0 }
}

central_asia_soviet_collapse_apply_soviet_pressure = {
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = central_asia_soviet_collapse_soviet_league_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = central_asia_soviet_collapse_soviet_depot_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = central_asia_soviet_collapse_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
	set_temp_variable = { central_asia_soviet_collapse_soviet_league_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { central_asia_soviet_collapse_soviet_depot_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { central_asia_soviet_collapse_soviet_foreign_pressure = 0 }
}

central_asia_soviet_collapse_apply_splinter_focus_unlock_bonus = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				tag = BSC
				tag = TNC
				tag = ALA
			}
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = bsc_focus_caravan_water_guarantees
				has_country_flag = tnc_focus_irrigation_boards
				has_country_flag = ala_focus_southern_republics_council
			}
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asia_splinter_water_bonus_registered }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asia_splinter_water_bonus_registered
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_central_asia_water_settlement = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.water_support_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.institution_gain }
		set_temp_variable = { central_asia_soviet_collapse_league_score_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.league_score_small }
		central_asia_soviet_collapse_add_league_score = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				tag = BSC
				tag = TNC
				tag = ALA
			}
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = bsc_focus_road_and_well_ledger
				has_country_flag = tnc_focus_cotton_rail_republic
				has_country_flag = ala_focus_resource_town_councils
			}
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asia_splinter_cotton_bonus_registered }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asia_splinter_cotton_bonus_registered
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_central_asia_cotton_rail_account = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.cotton_rail_gain }

		central_asia_soviet_collapse_add_league_score = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				tag = BSC
				tag = TNC
				tag = ALA
			}
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = bsc_focus_caravan_supply_hubs

				has_country_flag = ala_focus_kyrgyz_pass_guards
			}

				tag = BSC

			}
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = bsc_focus_central_asian_defense_council

				has_country_flag = ala_focus_central_asian_league_draft
			}

kaz_soviet_collapse_add_route_score = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_route_score = kaz_soviet_collapse_route_score_delta }
	clamp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_route_score
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_route.route_score_cap
	}
	set_temp_variable = { kaz_soviet_collapse_route_score_delta = 0 }
}

kaz_soviet_collapse_apply_soviet_pressure = {
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = kaz_soviet_collapse_soviet_republic_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = kaz_soviet_collapse_soviet_depot_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = kaz_soviet_collapse_soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
	set_temp_variable = { kaz_soviet_collapse_soviet_republic_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { kaz_soviet_collapse_soviet_depot_pressure = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { kaz_soviet_collapse_soviet_foreign_pressure = 0 }
}

	add_state_claim = 834

		limit = {
			CRI = {
				exists = yes
				NOT = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }
			}
			NOT = { has_war_with = CRI }
			can_declare_war_on = CRI
		}
		create_wargoal = {
			type = annex_everything
			target = CRI
			expire = 0
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			SOV = {
				exists = yes
				controls_state = 137
			}
			NOT = { has_war_with = SOV }
			can_declare_war_on = SOV
		}
		create_wargoal = {
			type = annex_everything

			expire = 0
		}
	}

soviet_collapse_apply_ukr_outside_old_map_settlement = {
	if = { limit = { 137 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 137 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = { limit = { 766 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 766 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = { limit = { 834 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 834 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = { limit = { 241 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 241 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = { limit = { 73 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 73 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = { limit = { 93 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 93 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = { limit = { 171 = { is_controlled_by = ROOT is_claimed_by = ROOT NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } } } 171 = { add_core_of = ROOT } }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_ukraine_league_program_score
				value = 1
				compare = greater_than
			}
		}
		add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.stability_medium
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.medium_recognition_gain }

	}
}

	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			tag = UKR
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_ukraine_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			tag = BLR
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_belarus_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			tag = KAZ
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			OR = {
				tag = LIT
				tag = LAT
				tag = EST
			}
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_baltic_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			OR = {
				tag = GEO
				tag = ARM
				tag = AZR
			}
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_caucasus_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			OR = {
				tag = UZB
				tag = KYR
				tag = TAJ
				tag = TMS
			}
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_central_asia_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			tag = MOL
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_moldova_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			OR = {
				tag = KAR
				tag = KOM
				tag = CRI
				tag = TAT
				tag = BSK
				tag = FER
				tag = YAK
				tag = BYA
				tag = TAN
			}
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_internal_republic_focus_tree }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			NOT = {
				OR = {
					tag = UKR
					tag = BLR
					tag = KAZ
					tag = LIT
					tag = LAT
					tag = EST
					tag = GEO
					tag = ARM
					tag = AZR
					tag = UZB
					tag = KYR
					tag = TAJ
					tag = TMS
					tag = MOL
					tag = KAR
					tag = KOM
					tag = CRI
					tag = TAT
					tag = BSK
					tag = FER
					tag = YAK
					tag = BYA
					tag = TAN
				}
			}
		}
		load_focus_tree = { tree = soviet_collapse_breakaway_focus_tree }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_add_republic_factory_focus_reward = {
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
		add_building_construction = { type = industrial_complex level = 1 instant_build = yes }
	}
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
		add_building_construction = { type = arms_factory level = 1 instant_build = yes }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_add_republic_civilian_focus_reward = {
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1
		add_building_construction = { type = industrial_complex level = 1 instant_build = yes }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_add_republic_fort_focus_reward = {
	capital_scope = {
		add_building_construction = { type = land_fort level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		add_building_construction = { type = anti_air_building level = 1 instant_build = yes }
	}
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		limit = { is_core_of = ROOT }
		add_building_construction = { type = land_fort level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = 1 instant_build = yes }
	}
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.command_power_small
	army_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.army_xp_small
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_depot_gain }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_control min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_focus_rail_authority_reward = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_depot_gain }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.depot_focus_gain }
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		limit = { is_core_of = ROOT }
		add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		add_building_construction = { type = supply_node level = 1 instant_build = yes }
	}
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.political_power_small
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_control min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
}

soviet_collapse_create_focus_mobile_column_template = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_focus_mobile_column_template_created } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_focus_mobile_column_template_created
		division_template = {
			name = "Republican Mobile Column"
			is_locked = yes
			force_allow_recruiting = yes
			regiments = {
				infantry = { x = 0 y = 0 }
				infantry = { x = 0 y = 1 }
				infantry = { x = 1 y = 0 }
				infantry = { x = 1 y = 1 }
				infantry = { x = 2 y = 0 }
			}
			support = {
				engineer = { x = 0 y = 0 }
			}
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_spawn_focus_mobile_column = {
	soviet_collapse_create_focus_mobile_column_template = yes
	add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.mobile_column_manpower
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.mobile_column_infantry_equipment }
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.mobile_column_support_equipment }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_focus_mobile_column_count = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.mobile_column_unit_count }
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			capital_scope = {
				create_unit = {
					division = "division_template = \"Republican Mobile Column\" start_experience_factor = 0.25 start_equipment_factor = 1 start_manpower_factor = 1"
					owner = PREV
					count = [MOBILE_COLUMN_COUNT]
				}
			}
		}
		MOBILE_COLUMN_COUNT = "[?soviet_collapse_focus_mobile_column_count|.0]"
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_focus_mobile_columns_reward = {
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.command_power_small
	army_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.army_xp_small
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_depot_gain }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.military_focus_gain }
	soviet_collapse_spawn_focus_mobile_column = yes
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_control min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
}

soviet_collapse_create_custom_splinter_assault_templates = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_assault_templates_created } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_assault_templates_created
		division_template = {
			name = "Chaos Assault Detachment"
			is_locked = yes
			force_allow_recruiting = yes
			regiments = {
				infantry = { x = 0 y = 0 }
				infantry = { x = 0 y = 1 }
				infantry = { x = 0 y = 2 }
				infantry = { x = 1 y = 0 }
				infantry = { x = 1 y = 1 }
				infantry = { x = 1 y = 2 }
				infantry = { x = 2 y = 0 }
				infantry = { x = 2 y = 1 }
				artillery_brigade = { x = 3 y = 0 }
			}
			support = {
				engineer = { x = 0 y = 0 }
				artillery = { x = 0 y = 1 }
			}
		}
		division_template = {
			name = "Chaos Raider Column"
			is_locked = yes
			force_allow_recruiting = yes
			regiments = {
				cavalry = { x = 0 y = 0 }
				cavalry = { x = 0 y = 1 }
				cavalry = { x = 1 y = 0 }
				cavalry = { x = 1 y = 1 }
				infantry = { x = 2 y = 0 }
				infantry = { x = 2 y = 1 }
			}
			support = {
				engineer = { x = 0 y = 0 }
			}
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_spawn_custom_splinter_assault_columns = {
	soviet_collapse_create_custom_splinter_assault_templates = yes
	add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_assault_manpower_gain
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_assault_infantry_equipment_gain }
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_assault_support_equipment_gain }
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = artillery_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_assault_artillery_equipment_gain }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_assault_count = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_assault_unit_count }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_raider_count = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_raider_unit_count }
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			capital_scope = {
				create_unit = {
					division = "division_template = \"Chaos Assault Detachment\" start_experience_factor = 0.35 start_equipment_factor = 1 start_manpower_factor = 1"
					owner = PREV
					count = [ASSAULT_COUNT]
				}
				create_unit = {
					division = "division_template = \"Chaos Raider Column\" start_experience_factor = 0.35 start_equipment_factor = 1 start_manpower_factor = 1"
					owner = PREV
					count = [RAIDER_COUNT]
				}
			}
		}
		ASSAULT_COUNT = "[?soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_assault_count|.0]"
		RAIDER_COUNT = "[?soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_raider_count|.0]"
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_custom_splinter_expansion_claims = {
	every_controlled_state = {
		limit = { NOT = { is_core_of = ROOT } }
		add_core_of = ROOT
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			SOV = { exists = yes }
			NOT = { has_war_with = SOV }
			NOT = { has_wargoal_against = SOV }
			can_declare_war_on = SOV
		}
		create_wargoal = { type = annex_everything target = SOV expire = 0 }
	}
	every_neighbor_country = {
		limit = {
			exists = yes
			NOT = { tag = ROOT }
			NOT = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }
			NOT = { ROOT = { has_wargoal_against = PREV } }
			ROOT = {
				NOT = { has_war_with = PREV }
				can_declare_war_on = PREV
			}
		}
		ROOT = {
			create_wargoal = { type = annex_everything target = PREV expire = 0 }
		}
	}
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_expansion_command_power_gain
	army_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_expansion_army_xp_gain
	add_war_support = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_expansion_war_support_gain
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.chaos_expansion_resilience_gain }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_legal_focus_route_payload = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_legal_focus_route_payload_granted } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_legal_focus_route_payload_granted
		if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = LIT tag = LAT tag = EST } }
			add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.political_power_small
			if = {
				limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } }
				add_decryption = {
					target = SOV
					amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.baltic_dossier_decryption_gain
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = UKR tag = BLR tag = MOL } }
			add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.stability_small
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_focus_gain }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = GEO tag = ARM tag = AZR } }
			add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.stability_small
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_recognition_gain }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = UZB tag = KYR tag = TAJ tag = TMS tag = KAZ } }
			add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.political_power_small
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_recognition_gain }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.local_pressure_gain }
			add_war_support = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.war_support_small
		}
		else = {
			add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.stability_small
		}
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_military_focus_route_payload = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_military_focus_route_payload_granted } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_military_focus_route_payload_granted
		if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = UKR tag = BLR tag = KAZ } }
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = artillery_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.artillery_equipment }
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = small_plane_airframe_0 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.recovered_airframes }
			army_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.army_xp_medium
			air_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.air_xp_small
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = LIT tag = LAT tag = EST tag = MOL tag = GEO tag = ARM tag = AZR } }
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.support_equipment }
			add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.command_power_small
			random_owned_controlled_state = {
				limit = { is_core_of = ROOT }
				add_building_construction = { type = anti_air_building level = 1 instant_build = yes }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = UZB tag = KYR tag = TAJ tag = TMS } }
			soviet_collapse_apply_focus_mobile_columns_reward = yes
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.support_equipment }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor }
			add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.militia_manpower
			add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.command_power_small
		}
		else = {
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.support_equipment }
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_depot_focus_route_payload = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_depot_focus_route_payload_granted } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_depot_focus_route_payload_granted

			limit = { OR = { tag = UKR tag = BLR tag = MOL tag = LIT tag = LAT tag = EST } }

				add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = 1 instant_build = yes }

				add_building_construction = { type = supply_node level = 1 instant_build = yes }

			random_owned_controlled_state = {

			}

		}

		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_socialist_focus_route_payload = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_socialist_focus_route_payload_granted } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_socialist_focus_route_payload_granted
		if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = UKR tag = BLR tag = MOL } }
			add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.press_network_ideology_popularity }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.ukr_autonomy_resilience_gain }
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.support_equipment }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = KAZ tag = UZB tag = KYR tag = TAJ tag = TMS } }
			add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_route.communism_popularity_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.institution_gain }
			soviet_collapse_apply_focus_rail_authority_reward = yes
			if = {
				limit = { tag = KAZ }
				add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_socialist_planning = constant:soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_route.socialist_planning_gain }
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = LIT tag = LAT tag = EST } }
			add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.liaison_ideology_popularity }
			add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.command_power_small
			if = {
				limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } }
				add_decryption = {
					target = SOV
					amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.baltic_dossier_decryption_gain
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = GEO tag = ARM tag = AZR } }
			add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.press_network_ideology_popularity }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_focus_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.resilience_gain }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor }
			add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.press_network_ideology_popularity }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.local_pressure_gain }
			add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.militia_manpower
		}
		else = {
			add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = constant:soviet_collapse_foreign_intervention.press_network_ideology_popularity }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_focus_gain }
		}
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_focus_route_payload = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_focus_route_payload_granted } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_foreign_focus_route_payload_granted
		if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = LIT tag = LAT tag = EST } }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.liaison_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.intelligence_patronage_risk }
			if = {
				limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } }
				add_decryption = {
					target = SOV
					amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.baltic_dossier_decryption_gain
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = UKR tag = BLR tag = MOL } }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.liaison_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.resilience_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.aid_corridor_patronage_risk }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = KAZ tag = UZB tag = KYR tag = TAJ tag = TMS } }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_central_asia_league.liaison_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.trade_patronage_risk }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { OR = { tag = GEO tag = ARM tag = AZR } }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.liaison_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.recognition_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.protection_treaty_patronage_risk }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.liaison_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.local_pressure_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.client_cabinet_patronage_risk }
		}
		else = {
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.liaison_gain }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_influence_war.liaison_patronage_risk }
		}
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_liaison_reach min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_independence_resilience min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_local_authority_pressure min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_maybe_report_single_republic_liaison_office = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_single_republic_liaison_reported }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					OR = { tag = LIT tag = LAT tag = EST }
					has_soviet_collapse_baltic_league_member_ready = yes
					NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_baltic_league_quorum = yes }
				}
				AND = {
					OR = { tag = GEO tag = ARM tag = AZR }
					has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_member_ready = yes
					NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes }
				}
				AND = {
					OR = { tag = UZB tag = KYR tag = TAJ tag = TMS tag = KAZ }
					has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_member_ready = yes
					NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes }
				}
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_single_republic_liaison_reported
		country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.45 }
	}
}

	}
}

soviet_collapse_found_regional_faction_common = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.found_political_power_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.found_command_power_spend
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_founder
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.found_cohesion }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.found_tension }
	soviet_collapse_join_regional_faction_common = yes
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { is_in_faction = yes } }
		set_rule = { can_create_factions = yes }
	}
	soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_soviet_pressure = yes
	if = { limit = { SOV = { exists = yes } } SOV = { soviet_collapse_prune_invalid_active_soviet_objectives = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_found_terminal_regional_faction_common = {
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_founder

soviet_collapse_invite_baltic_regional_partners = {
	if = { limit = { LIT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = LIT LIT = { soviet_collapse_join_baltic_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { LAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = LAT LAT = { soviet_collapse_join_baltic_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { EST = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = EST EST = { soviet_collapse_join_baltic_regional_faction = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_invite_caucasus_regional_partners = {
	if = { limit = { GEO = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = GEO GEO = { soviet_collapse_join_caucasus_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { ARM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = ARM ARM = { soviet_collapse_join_caucasus_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { AZR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = AZR AZR = { soviet_collapse_join_caucasus_regional_faction = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = {
	if = { limit = { UZB = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = UZB UZB = { soviet_collapse_join_central_asian_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { KYR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = KYR KYR = { soviet_collapse_join_central_asian_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { TAJ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = TAJ TAJ = { soviet_collapse_join_central_asian_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { TMS = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = TMS TMS = { soviet_collapse_join_central_asian_regional_faction = yes } }
	if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway has_soviet_collapse_three_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = KAZ KAZ = { soviet_collapse_join_central_asian_regional_faction = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_refresh_baltic_regional_faction = {
	if = { limit = { LIT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_founder } } LIT = { soviet_collapse_invite_baltic_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { LAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_founder } } LAT = { soviet_collapse_invite_baltic_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { EST = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_founder } } EST = { soviet_collapse_invite_baltic_regional_partners = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_refresh_caucasus_regional_faction = {
	if = { limit = { GEO = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_founder } } GEO = { soviet_collapse_invite_caucasus_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { ARM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_founder } } ARM = { soviet_collapse_invite_caucasus_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { AZR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_founder } } AZR = { soviet_collapse_invite_caucasus_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { MRC = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_founder } } MRC = { soviet_collapse_invite_caucasus_regional_partners = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_refresh_central_asian_regional_faction = {
	if = { limit = { UZB = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } UZB = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { KYR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } KYR = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { TAJ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } TAJ = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { TMS = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } TMS = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } KAZ = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { BSC = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } BSC = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { TNC = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } TNC = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { ALA = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } } ALA = { soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_form_terminal_regional_leagues = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_baltic_league_quorum = yes
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_announced }
		}
		if = { limit = { LIT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } LIT = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_baltic_restoration_pact = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { LAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } LAT = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_baltic_restoration_pact = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { EST = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } EST = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_baltic_restoration_pact = yes } }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_announced }
		soviet_collapse_refresh_baltic_regional_faction = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_announced }
		}
		if = { limit = { GEO = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } GEO = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_caucasus_defense_compact = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { ARM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } ARM = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_caucasus_defense_compact = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { AZR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } AZR = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_caucasus_defense_compact = yes } }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_announced }
		soviet_collapse_refresh_caucasus_regional_faction = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_announced }
		}
		if = { limit = { UZB = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } UZB = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_central_asian_league = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { KYR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } KYR = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_central_asian_league = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { TAJ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } TAJ = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_central_asian_league = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { TMS = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } TMS = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_central_asian_league = yes } }
		else_if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } KAZ = { soviet_collapse_found_terminal_central_asian_league = yes } }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_announced }
		soviet_collapse_refresh_central_asian_regional_faction = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_invite = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.invite_political_power_spend
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.invite_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.invite_tension }
	if = { limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_founder } soviet_collapse_invite_baltic_regional_partners = yes }
	if = { limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_founder } soviet_collapse_invite_caucasus_regional_partners = yes }
	if = { limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_founder } soviet_collapse_invite_central_asian_regional_partners = yes }
	soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_soviet_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_maybe_resolve_regional_faction_goal = yes
	news_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.48 }
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.38 }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_coordinate = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.coordinate_political_power_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.coordinate_command_power_spend
	add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.coordinate_fuel_spend
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.coordinate_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.coordinate_tension }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.recognition_gain }
	every_other_country = {
		limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_soviet_collapse_regional_faction_member = yes }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_gain }
		soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	}
	soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_soviet_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_maybe_resolve_regional_faction_goal = yes
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.39 }
}

soviet_collapse_pay_regional_faction_external_mandate_cost = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_political_power_spend
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_command_power_spend
	add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_fuel_spend
}

soviet_collapse_apply_regional_security_zone_mandate = {
	soviet_collapse_pay_regional_faction_external_mandate_cost = yes
	create_wargoal = { type = annex_everything target = FROM expire = 0 }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_tension }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_support }
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_soviet_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.external_mandate_soviet_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
	soviet_collapse_maybe_resolve_regional_faction_goal = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
}

soviet_collapse_set_regional_faction_defense_goal = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_political_power_spend
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_defense_goal
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_recognition_goal
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_logistics_goal
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_tension }
	add_war_support = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.war_support_small
	soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_soviet_pressure = yes
}
