soviet_collapse_apply_regional_charter_patron_channels = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.recognition_goal_gain }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.depot_gain }
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_set_regional_faction_logistics_goal = {
	add_political_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_political_power_spend
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_defense_goal
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_recognition_goal
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_logistics_goal
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.depot_gain }
	add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.emergency_manpower
	add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_infantry_equipment }
	soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_soviet_pressure = yes
}

soviet_collapse_clear_regional_faction_goal = {
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_defense_goal
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_recognition_goal
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_logistics_goal
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_goal_cooldown_days = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_resolution_cooldown_days }
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			set_country_flag = {
				flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_goal_recently_resolved
				days = [GOAL_COOLDOWN_DAYS]
			}
		}
		GOAL_COOLDOWN_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_regional_goal_cooldown_days|.0]"
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_goal_success = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_defense_goal }
		add_war_support = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.war_support_small
		every_other_country = {
			limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_soviet_collapse_regional_faction_member = yes }
			add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_manpower_reward
			add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_equipment_reward }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_recognition_goal }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.recognition_goal_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_success_resilience }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_logistics_goal }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.depot_gain }
		add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.emergency_manpower
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.medium_infantry_equipment }
	}
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_goal_success_recorded
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_success_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_success_tension }
	every_other_country = {
		limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_soviet_collapse_regional_faction_member = yes }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.resilience_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_gain }
		soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	}
	soviet_collapse_clear_regional_faction_goal = yes
	soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_soviet_pressure = yes
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.41 }
}

soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_goal_failure = {
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_goal_failure_recorded
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_failure_cohesion }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_failure_tension }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_failure_recognition }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.goal_failure_depot }
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.soviet_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_objective_pressure.league_failure_league }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
	soviet_collapse_clear_regional_faction_goal = yes
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.42 }
}

soviet_collapse_maybe_resolve_regional_faction_goal = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_regional_faction_goal_success = yes }
		soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_goal_success = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_regional_faction_goal_failure = yes }
		soviet_collapse_apply_regional_faction_goal_failure = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_reduce_regional_faction_tension = {
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.tension_command_power_spend
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_faction_tension = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.tension_reduction }
	add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.stability_small
	soviet_collapse_maybe_resolve_regional_faction_goal = yes
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.40 }
}

soviet_collapse_withdraw_from_regional_faction = {
	set_country_flag = { flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_recently_left days = 180 }
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_faction_member
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_baltic_league_member
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_member
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_member
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = -1 }
	if = { limit = { is_in_faction = yes } leave_faction = yes }
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.44 }
}

soviet_collapse_call_regional_league_defensive_war = {
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_command_power_spend
	add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_manpower_spend
	add_fuel = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_fuel_spend
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_regional_league_defensive_war_called
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_war_with = SOV }
			can_declare_war_on = SOV
		}
		declare_war_on = {
			target = SOV
			type = annex_everything
		}
	}
	every_other_country = {
		limit = {
			is_in_faction_with = ROOT
			is_soviet_collapse_regional_faction_member = yes
			NOT = { has_war_with = SOV }
		}
		add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_manpower_reward
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.war_equipment_reward }
		add_to_war = {
			targeted_alliance = ROOT
			enemy = SOV
			hostility_reason = asked_to_join
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
			SOV = {
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.soviet_release_pressure }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.soviet_release_pressure }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.soviet_foreign_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
				soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			}
		}
	soviet_collapse_maybe_resolve_regional_faction_goal = yes
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.43 }
}

	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain }
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
}

soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = {
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member
	if = {
		limit = { is_in_faction = no }
		create_faction = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_faction
	}

	if = { limit = { BLR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = BLR BLR = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = KAZ KAZ = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { LIT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = LIT LIT = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { LAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = LAT LAT = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { EST = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = EST EST = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { GEO = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = GEO GEO = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { ARM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = ARM ARM = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { AZR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = AZR AZR = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { MOL = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = MOL MOL = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { UZB = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = UZB UZB = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { KYR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = KYR KYR = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { TAJ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = TAJ TAJ = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	if = { limit = { TMS = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } add_to_faction = TMS TMS = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_member add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.league_large_gain } soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes } }
	soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes

	soviet_collapse_apply_focus_league_preparation = yes
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_league_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.large_league_gain }
			soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_prune_invalid_active_soviet_objectives = yes
		}

	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced } }
		set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced
		news_event = { id = chaosx.news.5002 days = 1 }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_refresh_free_republics_league = {
	if = { limit = { UKR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } UKR = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { BLR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } BLR = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } KAZ = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { MOL = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } MOL = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { KAR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } KAR = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { KOM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } KOM = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { TAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } TAT = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { BSK = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } BSK = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { CRI = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } CRI = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { FER = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } FER = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { SZA = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } SZA = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { FEV = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } FEV = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { KZR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } KZR = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }

	else_if = { limit = { KHW = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } KHW = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
	else_if = { limit = { ALN = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_founder } } ALN = { soviet_collapse_invite_free_republics_league_partners = yes } }
}

soviet_collapse_prepare_terminal_free_republics_league_quorum = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_major_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	if = { limit = { UKR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_major_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { BLR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_major_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_major_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { MOL = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { KAR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { KOM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { TAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { BSK = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { CRI = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { FER = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { YAK = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { BYA = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
	if = { limit = { TAN = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.full_factor } }
}

soviet_collapse_form_terminal_free_republics_league = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced } }
		soviet_collapse_prepare_terminal_free_republics_league_quorum = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_member_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.terminal_free_republics_member_quorum compare = greater_than_or_equals }
					AND = {
						check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_terminal_free_republics_major_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_regional_faction.terminal_free_republics_forceful_major_quorum compare = greater_than_or_equals }
						has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes
					}
				}
			}
			if = { limit = { UKR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } UKR = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { BLR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } BLR = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } KAZ = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { MOL = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } MOL = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { KAR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } KAR = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { KOM = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } KOM = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { TAT = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } TAT = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { BSK = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } BSK = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { CRI = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } CRI = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { FER = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } FER = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { YAK = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } YAK = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { BYA = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } BYA = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { TAN = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_breakaway is_in_faction = no } } TAN = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { SZA = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor is_in_faction = no } } SZA = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { FEV = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor is_in_faction = no } } FEV = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { KZR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor is_in_faction = no } } KZR = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { SOG = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor is_in_faction = no } } SOG = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { KHW = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor is_in_faction = no } } KHW = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
			else_if = { limit = { ALN = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor is_in_faction = no } } ALN = { soviet_collapse_form_free_republics_league_from_ukraine = yes } }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced }
		soviet_collapse_refresh_free_republics_league = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_cfr_survey_unfinished_sites = {
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.command_power_low_spend
	add_to_variable = { cfr_construction_mandates = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.small_mandate_gain }
	add_ideas = cfr_construction_mandates
	soviet_collapse_advance_cfr_site_registry_depth = yes
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = @soviet_collapse_cfr_site_infrastructure_level instant_build = yes }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_cfr_reconstruction_contracts = {
	add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.command_power_medium_spend
	add_to_variable = { cfr_construction_mandates = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.small_mandate_spend }
	add_ideas = cfr_housing_ration_boards
	soviet_collapse_advance_cfr_contract_network_depth = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_cities_first
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_rails_first
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_factories_first
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_contracts_first
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_advance_cfr_contract_network_depth = yes
	}
	random_owned_controlled_state = {
		add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = @soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_building_slots
		add_building_construction = { type = industrial_complex level = @soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_factory_level instant_build = yes }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_cities_first
				has_country_flag = cfr_focus_apartment_blocks_loyalty
				has_country_flag = cfr_focus_buy_peace_with_concrete
			}
		}
		add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.stability_small
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_rails_first
				has_country_flag = cfr_strategy_factories_first
				has_country_flag = cfr_focus_pour_final_foundation
			}
		}
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = @soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_building_slots
			add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = @soviet_collapse_cfr_site_infrastructure_level instant_build = yes }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_small }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_advance_cfr_site_registry_depth = {
	add_to_variable = { cfr_site_registry_depth = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_site_registry_depth_gain }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = cfr_site_registry_depth value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_first_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_site_registry_first_milestone }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_site_registry_first_milestone
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_depot_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_focus_gain }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = cfr_site_registry_depth value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_second_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_site_registry_second_milestone }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_site_registry_second_milestone
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_recognition_gain }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.command_power_low_cost
	}
}

soviet_collapse_advance_cfr_contract_network_depth = {
	add_to_variable = { cfr_contract_network_depth = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_network_depth_gain }
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = cfr_focus_factories_as_embassies }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_recognition_gain }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = cfr_focus_reconstruction_protectorates }
		add_to_variable = { cfr_protectorate_network_depth = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_protectorate_network_depth_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_league_gain }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_support_strength min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			add_building_construction = { type = bunker level = @soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_fort_level instant_build = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
			SOV = {
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_protectorate_foreign_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = cfr_focus_rebuild_russia_without_moscow }
		add_to_variable = { cfr_rebuild_network_depth = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_rebuild_network_depth_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_depot_gain }
		add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.stability_small
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = cfr_contract_network_depth value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_first_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_network_first_milestone }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_network_first_milestone
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.institution_focus_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_recognition_gain }
		clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = cfr_contract_network_depth value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_second_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_network_second_milestone }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_network_second_milestone
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_depot_gain }
		add_to_variable = { cfr_construction_mandates = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.small_mandate_gain }
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = @soviet_collapse_cfr_contract_building_slots
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.cfr_contract_foreign_pressure }
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

			add_building_construction = { type = anti_air_building level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				tag = DHC
				tag = KHC
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_host_crossing_front_tt
		soviet_collapse_apply_focus_mobile_columns_reward = yes
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_depot_gain }
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			add_building_construction = { type = bunker level = 1 instant_build = yes }
			add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				tag = FEV
				tag = ARD
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_coastal_front_tt
		navy_experience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.navy_xp_medium
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = convoy_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_convoy_reward }
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			limit = { is_coastal = yes }
			add_building_construction = { type = coastal_bunker level = 1 instant_build = yes }
			add_building_construction = { type = dockyard level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				tag = SZA
				tag = IUL
				tag = BAC
				tag = NLC
			}
		}
		custom_effect_tooltip = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_rail_arsenal_front_tt
		soviet_collapse_apply_focus_rail_authority_reward = yes
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.support_equipment }
		random_owned_controlled_state = {
			add_building_construction = { type = infrastructure level = 1 instant_build = yes }
			add_building_construction = { type = anti_air_building level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { tag = UWD }
		custom_effect_tooltip = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_rail_arsenal_front_tt
		soviet_collapse_apply_focus_mobile_columns_reward = yes
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.medium_depot_gain }

			add_building_construction = { type = anti_air_building level = 1 instant_build = yes }
		}

soviet_collapse_apply_custom_splinter_diplomatic_plan_bonus = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_diplomatic_payoff = yes
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_diplomatic_bonus_used }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_diplomatic_bonus_used
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_recognition_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_support_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_league_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_liaison_reach = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_liaison_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_influence_patronage_risk = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_patronage_relief }
		add_stability = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_stability_gain
		soviet_collapse_apply_custom_splinter_diplomatic_route_bonus = yes
		if = {
			limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
			SOV = {
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_soviet_foreign_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.diplomatic_soviet_republic_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_custom_splinter_war_plan_bonus = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_war_payoff = yes
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_war_bonus_used }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_war_bonus_used
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_command_power_gain
		add_manpower = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_manpower_gain
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = infantry_equipment amount = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_infantry_equipment_gain }
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = { type = support_equipment_1 amount = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_support_equipment_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_resilience_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_depot_gain }
		add_war_support = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_support_gain
		soviet_collapse_apply_custom_splinter_war_route_bonus = yes
		soviet_collapse_spawn_custom_splinter_assault_columns = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_war_plan_payoff = yes }
			soviet_collapse_apply_custom_splinter_expansion_claims = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
			SOV = {
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_obedience_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_soviet_obedience_pressure }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.war_soviet_depot_pressure }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_source_republic_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_custom_splinter_payoff.enemy_front_soviet_republic_pressure }
				soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
				soviet_collapse_apply_breakaway_source_pressure_delta = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

	set_country_flag = dhc_focus_stanitsa_mediation

	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.dhc_mediation_recognition_gain }
	clamp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_recognition_progress min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }

			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_old_movement_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.dhc_mediation_old_movement_relief }
			soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_advance_udc_command_network_depth = {
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_depth = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.udc_command_network_depth_gain }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_depth value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_first_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_first_milestone }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_first_milestone
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_institution_strength = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_idea.military_focus_gain }
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_independence_resilience = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_milestone_gain }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_depth value = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_second_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_second_milestone }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_udc_command_network_second_milestone
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_control = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.focus_depth_milestone_gain }
		add_command_power = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.command_power_small
	}
}

		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_recognition_progress = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.small_recognition_gain }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_country_flag = udc_focus_radio_command_posts SOV = { exists = yes } }
		add_decryption = {
			target = SOV
			amount = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.baltic_dossier_decryption_gain
		}
	}
	soviet_collapse_add_republic_focus_recovery_progress = yes
	soviet_collapse_update_consolidated_republic_ideas = yes
	if = {
		limit = { SOV = { exists = yes is_soviet_collapse_active = yes } }
		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_obedience_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.military_obedience_focus_pressure }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_depot_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_republic_focus.soviet_pressure_small }
			if = {
				limit = { UDC = { has_country_flag = udc_focus_counter_secession_cells } }

			}
			soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

		SOV = {
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_old_movement_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_medium }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_small }
			soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
			soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_record_high_chaos_successor_evolution = {
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_event_id = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.event_id }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_type = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.evolution_type }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_tier = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.totalen_tier }
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_tier = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.world_collapse_tier }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_record_high_chaos_evolution_this_tier = yes }
		save_event_target_as = events_log_evolution_actor
		record_events_log_evolution_entry = yes
		if = {
			limit = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
			set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_evolution_tier_5_recorded
		}
		else = {
			set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_evolution_tier_4_recorded
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_setup_cfr_successor = {
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_factory_successor
	set_capital = {
		state = 248
		remember_old_capital = no
	}
	soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = yes
	load_focus_tree = { tree = CFR_soviet_collapse_focus_tree keep_completed = no }
	set_variable = { cfr_construction_mandates = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.medium_mandate_gain }
	add_ideas = cfr_construction_mandates
	add_ideas = cfr_housing_ration_boards
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.civilian_factory_stage }
	soviet_collapse_record_high_chaos_successor_evolution = yes
	country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5_factory_ancient.1 hours = 6 }
}

soviet_collapse_spawn_cfr_if_enabled = {
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_event_id = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.event_id }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_type = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.evolution_type }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.civilian_factory_stage }
	if = {
		limit = {
			can_soviet_collapse_spawn_cfr = yes
			OR = { is_current_evolution_enabled = yes has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_triggerable_scenario_include_chaos }
		}
		248 = {
			add_core_of = CFR
			transfer_state_to = CFR
		}
		253 = {
			add_core_of = CFR
			transfer_state_to = CFR
		}
		CFR = { soviet_collapse_setup_cfr_successor = yes }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_small }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_old_movement_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_small }
		soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
	}
}

	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_event_id = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.event_id }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_type = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.evolution_type }
	set_temp_variable = { events_log_evolution_stage = constant:soviet_collapse_high_chaos_event_log.tunguska_star_stage }
	if = {
		limit = {
			can_soviet_collapse_spawn_tsc = yes
			OR = { is_current_evolution_enabled = yes has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_triggerable_scenario_include_chaos }
		}
		575 = {
			add_core_of = TSC
			transfer_state_to = TSC
		}
		576 = {
			add_core_of = TSC
			transfer_state_to = TSC
		}
		TSC = { soviet_collapse_setup_tsc_successor = yes }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_old_movement_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_medium }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_pressure_delta = constant:soviet_collapse_factory_ancient.soviet_pressure_small }
		soviet_collapse_apply_objective_source_pressure_delta = yes
		soviet_collapse_apply_foreign_pressure_delta = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_clear_republic_selection_weights = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_ukr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_blr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_mol = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_lit = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_lat = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_est = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_geo = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_arm = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_azr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_uzb = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_kyr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_taj = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_tms = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_kaz = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_kar = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_kom = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_cri = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_tat = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_bsk = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_fer = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_yak = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_bya = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_tan = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_fev = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_sza = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_uwd = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_mrc = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.disabled_weight }
}

soviet_collapse_start_republic_selection_pool = {
	clear_temp_array = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 0 }
}

soviet_collapse_pick_first_wave_republic_from_selection_pool = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min compare = greater_than }
		}
		random_scope_in_array = {
			array = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool
			add_to_array = { array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics value = THIS }
		}
	}
	clear_temp_array = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 0 }
}

soviet_collapse_save_progressive_target_from_selection_pool = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min compare = greater_than }
		}
		random_scope_in_array = {
			array = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool
			save_event_target_as = soviet_collapse_release_target
		}
	}
	clear_temp_array = soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 0 }
}

soviet_collapse_set_first_wave_western_selection_weights = {
	soviet_collapse_clear_republic_selection_weights = yes
	if = { limit = { UKR = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_ukr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { BLR = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_blr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { MOL = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_mol = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { LIT = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_lit = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { LAT = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_lat = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { EST = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_est = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
}

soviet_collapse_set_first_wave_caucasus_selection_weights = {
	soviet_collapse_clear_republic_selection_weights = yes
	if = { limit = { GEO = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_geo = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { ARM = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_arm = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
	if = { limit = { AZR = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_weight_azr = constant:soviet_collapse_release_selection.candidate_weight } }
}

}

soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_western_republic = {
	soviet_collapse_start_republic_selection_pool = yes
	if = { limit = { UKR = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } UKR = { add_to_temp_array = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool = THIS } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { BLR = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } BLR = { add_to_temp_array = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool = THIS } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { MOL = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } MOL = { add_to_temp_array = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool = THIS } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { LIT = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } LIT = { add_to_temp_array = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool = THIS } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { LAT = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } LAT = { add_to_temp_array = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool = THIS } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { EST = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes } } EST = { add_to_temp_array = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool = THIS } } add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_selection_pool_count = 1 } }
	soviet_collapse_pick_first_wave_republic_from_selection_pool = yes
}

		}
		soviet_collapse_set_progressive_general_selection_weights = yes
		soviet_collapse_save_progressive_target_from_selection_weights = yes
		soviet_collapse_clear_republic_selection_weights = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_save_regional_priority_progressive_republic_target = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_two_western_republics_free = yes }
		soviet_collapse_save_random_western_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_baltic_league_quorum = yes }
		soviet_collapse_save_random_baltic_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes }
		soviet_collapse_save_random_caucasus_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_save_random_central_asian_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_save_random_kazakhstan_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_internal_release_cascade_pressure = yes }
		soviet_collapse_save_random_internal_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_save_pressure_successor_progressive_target = {
	soviet_collapse_save_random_pressure_successor_progressive_target = yes
}

soviet_collapse_count_progressive_release_family_candidates = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_general_candidates = 0 }
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_western_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_baltic_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_caucasus_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_central_asian_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_kazakhstan_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_internal_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_pressure_successor_progressive_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates = 1 } }
	}
	every_possible_country = {
		limit = { is_soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
		SOV = { add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_general_candidates = 1 } }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_family_weights = {
	soviet_collapse_count_progressive_release_family_candidates = yes
	soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_regional_cascade = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_western }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_baltic }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_caucasus }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_central_asia }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_kazakhstan }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_internal }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_pressure_successor }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_general_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.base_general }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component = soviet_collapse_republic_confidence }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.republic_confidence }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.momentum_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.momentum_cap }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.moscow_authority }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.authority_deficit_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.authority_deficit_cap }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.secondary_component_factor }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.pressure_successor_component_factor }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.low_threat }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.threat_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.threat_cap }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.secondary_component_factor }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component = soviet_collapse_foreign_appetite }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.foreign_appetite }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_cap }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_regional_component_factor }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_secondary_component }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component = soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.cascade_per_score_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.cascade_cap }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.moderate_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.moderate_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.moderate_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.moderate_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.moderate_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.moderate_threat_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.severe_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.severe_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.severe_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.severe_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.severe_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.severe_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.severe_threat_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.pressure_successor_severe_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_authority compare = less_than }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_authority_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_authority_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_authority_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_authority_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_authority_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_authority_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_military_obedience value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_obedience compare = less_than }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_obedience_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_obedience_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_obedience_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_obedience_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.low_obedience_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_republic_confidence value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_gate.republic_pressure compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.republic_momentum_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.republic_momentum_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.republic_momentum_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.republic_momentum_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.republic_momentum_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.republic_momentum_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_appetite value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_gate.foreign_pressure compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_pressure_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_pressure_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_regional_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_regional_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.foreign_regional_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_two_western_republics_free = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.cascade_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_two_western_republics_free = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_western_border_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.western_border_pressure_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_moldova_dniester_release_pressure = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.moldova_dniester_pressure_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_neighbor_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.caucasus_single_pressure_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_neighbor_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.central_asia_single_pressure_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_baltic_league_quorum = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.cascade_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.cascade_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes
			}
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.cascade_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.kazakhstan_southern_cascade_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_internal_release_cascade_pressure = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.internal_cascade_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.internal_cascade_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
			}
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.pressure_successor_chaos_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_old_movement_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_gate.severe_old_movement_pressure compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.pressure_successor_old_movement_add }
	}
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	clamp_temp_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_family_general_weight min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_family_weight.family_weight_cap }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = 0 } }
