	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = 0 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_general_candidates = 0 } } set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_general_weight = 0 } }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_western_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_baltic_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_caucasus_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_central_asia_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_internal_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_general_weight = soviet_collapse_release_family_general_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_western_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_western_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_baltic_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_caucasus_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_central_asia_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_kazakhstan_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_internal_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_general_candidates = soviet_collapse_release_family_general_candidates }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_momentum_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_momentum_component }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_authority_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_authority_component }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_threat_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_threat_component }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_foreign_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_foreign_component }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_cascade_component = soviet_collapse_release_family_cascade_component }
}

soviet_collapse_save_weighted_progressive_release_target = {
	soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_family_weights = yes
	random_list = {
		seed = random
		soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_western_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_baltic_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_caucasus_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_central_asian_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_kazakhstan_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_internal_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_pressure_successor_progressive_target = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_release_family_general_weight = {
			soviet_collapse_save_random_general_progressive_release_target = yes
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.severe_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_save_pressure_successor_progressive_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target } }
		soviet_collapse_save_random_general_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_family_general_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
}

soviet_collapse_save_random_threat_breakaway_republic_target = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_moldova_dniester_release_pressure = yes }
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
				MOL = { is_soviet_collapse_western_progressive_release_candidate = yes }
			}
			MOL = { save_event_target_as = soviet_collapse_release_target }
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_neighbor_release_pressure = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_save_random_caucasus_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_neighbor_release_pressure = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_save_random_central_asian_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
		soviet_collapse_save_regional_priority_progressive_republic_target = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target } }
		soviet_collapse_save_weighted_progressive_release_target = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_count_progressive_release_candidates = {
	soviet_collapse_count_progressive_release_family_candidates = yes
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count = soviet_collapse_release_family_general_candidates }
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count = soviet_collapse_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates }
}

soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_regional_cascade = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = 0 }

	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_two_western_republics_free = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_baltic_league_quorum = yes
			}
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_per_active_region_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_two_western_republics_free = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_western_border_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.western_border_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_neighbor_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_caucasus_league_quorum = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_per_active_region_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes
			}
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_per_active_region_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_two_smaller_central_asian_republics_free = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_league_quorum = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_central_asian_neighbor_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_internal_release_cascade_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_per_active_region_add }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_pressure_gain = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_monthly_add }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.urgency_pressure_per_score }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.urgency_pressure_monthly_cap
	}
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_pressure_per_score }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_pressure_monthly_cap
	}
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_pressure_per_candidate }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_pressure_monthly_cap
	}
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component }

	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.moderate_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.high_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.moderate_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.high_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.severe_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.high_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.severe_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.critical_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals } }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.severe_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.critical_threat compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.critical_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_authority compare = less_than }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.weak_authority_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_military_obedience value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_obedience compare = less_than }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.weak_obedience_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_failure_release_pressure = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failure_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min compare = greater_than }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_pressure_add }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.real_release_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_severe_component_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.severe_component_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_post_opening_breakaway_mtth_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.post_opening_breakaway_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.low_threat_follow_on_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.league_announcement_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.high_chaos_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.extreme_chaos_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.latent_only_pressure_monthly_gain_cap compare = greater_than }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.latent_only_pressure_monthly_gain_cap }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.calm_sustained_pressure_monthly_add compare = greater_than }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.calm_sustained_pressure_monthly_add }
	}
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_monthly_gain_cap
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_component = 0 }
}

soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_candidate_release_weight = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_count_weight_add }
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.moderate_threat compare = less_than }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_count_calm_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.high_threat compare = less_than }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_authority compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 } }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_count_moderate_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.severe_threat compare = less_than }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_count_high_cap }
	}
	else = {
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_count_terminal_cap }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight value = soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap compare = greater_than }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap }
	}
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.candidate_count_weight_cap
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_progressive_release_final_weight_dampening = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.moscow_authority compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_military_obedience value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.military_obedience compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.moderate_threat compare = less_than }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_release_level_component_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.high_authority_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.high_obedience_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_opening_release_emergency = yes }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat value = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.severe_threat compare = less_than }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.opening_strong_center_release_factor }
	}
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.miss_weight_ceiling
	}
}

soviet_collapse_apply_progressive_release_real_pressure_weighting = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_release_level_component_pressure = yes
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.real_pressure_release_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.compound_pressure_release_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.compound_pressure_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cascade_pressure_release_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cascade_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.war_pressure_release_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_failure_release_pressure = yes
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failure_pressure_release_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_mission_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.league_announcement_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_post_opening_breakaway_mtth_pressure = yes
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_roll_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.post_opening_breakaway_sustained_release_add }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.post_opening_breakaway_miss_factor }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.post_opening_breakaway_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
				has_soviet_collapse_neighbor_mtth_release_pressure = yes
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_roll_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_sustained_release_add }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_release_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_miss_factor }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
				has_soviet_collapse_neighbor_mtth_release_pressure = yes
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_mature_release_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.latent_only_release_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.latent_only_miss_factor }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_roll_weights = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = mtth:soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = mtth:soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.miss_weight_floor }
	soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_candidate_release_weight = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_weight = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_urgency_weight_factor }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_weight
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_urgency_weight_cap
	}
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure }
	add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_weight }
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_release_level_component_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_level_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_level_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_authority compare = less_than }
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_military_obedience value = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_obedience compare = less_than }
			}
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.center_failure_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.center_failure_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.compound_release_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.compound_release_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_roll_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_active_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_level_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.center_failure_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_release_add }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.severe_pressure_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.severe_pressure_miss_floor }
	}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
				has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes
			}
			add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_roll_release_add }
			set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_miss_floor }
		}
		if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_neighbor_mtth_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_neighbor_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_post_opening_breakaway_mtth_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.post_opening_breakaway_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.post_opening_breakaway_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.low_threat_follow_on_roll_release_add }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.low_threat_follow_on_miss_factor }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.low_threat_follow_on_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_contained_low_threat_follow_on_pressure = yes }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.low_threat_follow_on_strong_center_release_factor }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.low_threat_follow_on_strong_center_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score value = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.real_release_pressure_urgency_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.critical_urgency_roll_release_add }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.critical_urgency_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_roll_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min compare = greater_than }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_roll_release_add }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_miss_factor }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_miss_floor }
	}
	soviet_collapse_apply_progressive_release_final_weight_dampening = yes
	soviet_collapse_apply_progressive_release_real_pressure_weighting = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_release_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_release_factor }
	}
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.miss_weight_ceiling
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_miss_reduction_per_score }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_miss_reduction_cap
	}
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.urgency_miss_reduction_per_score }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.urgency_miss_reduction_cap
	}
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.miss_weight_ceiling
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_miss_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_miss_reduction_per_point }
		clamp_temp_variable = {
			var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction
			min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
			max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_miss_reduction_cap
		}
		subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_miss_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			}
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_miss_factor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.real_pressure_force_release_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.real_pressure_force_release_weight_add }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.real_pressure_force_release_miss_factor }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.real_pressure_force_release_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_forced_progressive_release_pressure = yes
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.forced_release_weight_add }
		multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.forced_release_miss_factor }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.forced_release_miss_floor }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.miss_weight_ceiling }
	}
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.miss_weight_ceiling
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight value = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor compare = less_than }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_floor }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_snapshot_progressive_release_roll_state = {
	soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_family_weights = yes
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_miss_weight = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_cascade_score = soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_candidate_count = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_pressure = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_failed_months = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months }
}

soviet_collapse_clear_progressive_release_roll_snapshot = {
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_miss_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_urgency_score = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_candidate_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_failed_months = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_western_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_baltic_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_caucasus_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_central_asia_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_kazakhstan_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_internal_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_pressure_successor_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_general_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_western_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_baltic_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_caucasus_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_central_asia_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_kazakhstan_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_internal_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_pressure_successor_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_general_candidates = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_momentum_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_authority_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_threat_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_foreign_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_last_progressive_release_family_cascade_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
}

soviet_collapse_release_event_target_progressive_republic = {
	event_target:soviet_collapse_release_target = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				tag = FEV
				SOV = { can_soviet_collapse_spawn_fev = yes }
			}
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_spawn_fev_if_enabled = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				tag = SZA
				SOV = { can_soviet_collapse_spawn_sza = yes }
			}
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_spawn_sza_if_enabled = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				tag = UWD
				SOV = { can_soviet_collapse_spawn_uwd = yes }
			}
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_spawn_uwd_if_enabled = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				tag = MRC
				SOV = { can_soviet_collapse_spawn_mrc = yes }
			}
			SOV = { soviet_collapse_spawn_mrc_if_enabled = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = no
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						tag = FEV
						tag = SZA
						tag = UWD
						tag = MRC
					}
				}
			}
			SOV = { release = event_target:soviet_collapse_release_target }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				is_subject_of = SOV
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						tag = FEV
						tag = SZA
						tag = UWD
						tag = MRC
					}
				}
			}
			SOV = { set_autonomy = { target = PREV autonomy_state = autonomy_free } }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_high_chaos_successor }
			}
			soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = yes
			soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_finish_progressive_release = {
	clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_progressive_release_selection
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_selected
	clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_roll_confirmed
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_mature_retained_after_release }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_retained_after_release }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cascade_pressure_retained_after_release }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score value = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.real_release_pressure_urgency_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
		}
		add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.critical_urgency_retained_after_release }
	}
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_severe_gate
	}
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_retained_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	soviet_collapse_compute_next_progressive_release_check_days = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_cooldown_days = soviet_collapse_next_progressive_release_check_days }
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_interval_locked
	meta_effect = {
		text = {
			set_global_flag = {
				flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_cooldown
				days = [COOLDOWN_DAYS]
			}
		}
		COOLDOWN_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_progressive_release_cooldown_days|.0]"
	}
}

soviet_collapse_release_one_threat_breakaway_republic = {
	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_fire_progressive_release_report = yes }
		if = {
			limit = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
			soviet_collapse_release_event_target_progressive_republic = yes
			soviet_collapse_finish_progressive_release = yes
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_selected }
				soviet_collapse_release_selected_progressive_republics = yes
				soviet_collapse_finish_progressive_release = yes
			}
			else = {
				clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_progressive_release_selection
			}
		}
	}
	else = {
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_progressive_release_selection
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_selected
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_roll_confirmed
	}
}

soviet_collapse_fire_progressive_release_event = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_ministry_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_ministry_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_rail_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_rail_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_border_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_border_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_party_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_party_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_foreign_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_foreign_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_depot_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_depot_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_old_movement_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_old_movement_weight }
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_league_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.cause_league_weight }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_foreign_appetite value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.foreign_appetite compare = less_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_foreign_weight = 0 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_depot_vulnerability value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.depot_vulnerability compare = less_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_depot_weight = 0 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_old_movement_pressure value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.old_movement_pressure compare = less_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_old_movement_weight = 0 }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_league_pressure_ready = yes }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_league_cohesion value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.league_cohesion compare = less_than_or_equals }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_cause_league_weight = 0 }
	}
	soviet_collapse_save_random_threat_breakaway_republic_target = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_event_target = soviet_collapse_release_target }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_roll_confirmed
		random_list = {
			seed = random
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_ministry_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.130 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_rail_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.131 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_border_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.132 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_party_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.133 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_foreign_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.134 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_depot_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.135 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_old_movement_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.136 } }
			soviet_collapse_release_cause_league_weight = { country_event = { id = chaosx.nr5.137 } }
		}
	}
	else = {
		soviet_collapse_register_progressive_release_miss = yes
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_progressive_release_selection
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_selected
		clr_country_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_roll_confirmed
	}
}

soviet_collapse_register_progressive_release_miss = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
				has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_miss_pressure_gain }
		if = {
			limit = { has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_miss_real_pressure_gain }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score value = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.real_release_pressure_urgency_gate compare = greater_than_or_equals }
			}
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_miss_high_urgency_gain }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_miss_cascade_gain }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_soviet_collapse_sustained_mtth_release_pressure = yes
				check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min compare = greater_than }
			}
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_miss_increment }
			clamp_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months
				min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
				max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_memory_cap
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
			has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_free_republics_league_announced
		}
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_miss_cascade_gain }
	}
	clamp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_cap
	}
}

soviet_collapse_register_progressive_release_wait_month = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_cooldown }
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min compare = greater_than }
			has_soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pacing_ready = yes
			has_soviet_collapse_sustained_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_roll_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			OR = {
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
				has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes
			}
			NOT = { can_soviet_collapse_roll_progressive_release = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_forced_progressive_release_pressure = yes }
		}
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_miss_increment }
		clamp_variable = {
			var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months
			min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
			max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_memory_cap
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_urgency = {
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = 0 }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_republic_confidence }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.republic_confidence }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.momentum_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.momentum_per_point_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.moscow_authority }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_moscow_authority }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max
	}
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.authority_deficit_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.authority_deficit_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.military_obedience }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_military_obedience }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max
	}
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.obedience_deficit_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.obedience_deficit_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_progressive_release.low_threat }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.threat_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.threat_per_point_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_foreign_appetite }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.foreign_appetite }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.foreign_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.foreign_per_point_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_depot_vulnerability }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.depot_vulnerability }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.depot_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.depot_per_point_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_league_cohesion }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.league_cohesion }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.league_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.league_per_point_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_old_movement_pressure }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.old_movement_pressure }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.old_movement_per_point_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.old_movement_per_point_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_urgency_per_score }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.regional_cascade_urgency_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count }
	subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_threat_guard.early_breakaway_gate }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.breakaway_count_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.breakaway_count_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_last_month_failed_objectives }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.last_failed_objective_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.last_failed_objective_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months }
	multiply_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_urgency_add }
	clamp_temp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_urgency_cap
	}
	add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component }

	clamp_variable = {
		var = soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score
		min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
		max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.release_urgency_cap
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_soviet_collapse_calm_mtth_release_block = yes }
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_component = 0 }
}

soviet_collapse_accumulate_progressive_release_pressure = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pacing_ready = yes
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_neighbor_mtth_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_post_opening_breakaway_mtth_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_release_level_component_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_severe_component_release_pressure = yes
				check_variable = {
					var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months
					value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_roll_gate
					compare = greater_than_or_equals
				}
			}
			has_soviet_collapse_sustained_mtth_release_pressure = yes
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = 0 compare = greater_than }
		}
		soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_pressure_gain = yes
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain }
		if = {
			limit = { has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes }
			add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.compound_latent_pressure_monthly_add }
		}
		clamp_variable = {
			var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure
			min = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min
			max = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.sustained_pressure_cap
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure_gain = 0 }
		soviet_collapse_register_progressive_release_wait_month = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = 0 compare = less_than_or_equals }
		}
		soviet_collapse_retain_progressive_release_pressure_without_candidate = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						has_soviet_collapse_real_release_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_neighbor_mtth_release_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_post_opening_breakaway_mtth_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_low_threat_follow_on_release_lane = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_compound_latent_mtth_release_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_release_level_component_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_compound_release_pressure = yes
						has_soviet_collapse_severe_component_release_pressure = yes
						check_variable = {
							var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months
							value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.failed_month_roll_gate
							compare = greater_than_or_equals
						}
					}
				}
				NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_sustained_mtth_release_pressure = yes }
			}
		}
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_maybe_release_threat_breakaway = {
	soviet_collapse_count_progressive_release_candidates = yes
	soviet_collapse_release_first_year_backlog_republics = yes
	soviet_collapse_count_progressive_release_candidates = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = 0 compare = greater_than }
			has_soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pacing_ready = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_regional_cascade = yes
		soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_urgency = yes
	}
	else = {
		set_variable = { soviet_collapse_release_urgency_score = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_regional_cascade_score = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
		soviet_collapse_clear_progressive_release_roll_snapshot = yes
	}
	soviet_collapse_decay_progressive_release_pressure = yes
	soviet_collapse_accumulate_progressive_release_pressure = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = 0 compare = greater_than }
			has_soviet_collapse_progressive_release_pacing_ready = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_compute_progressive_release_roll_weights = yes
		soviet_collapse_snapshot_progressive_release_roll_state = yes
	}
	else = {
		soviet_collapse_clear_progressive_release_roll_snapshot = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				can_soviet_collapse_roll_progressive_release = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_forced_progressive_release_pressure = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				check_variable = {
					var = soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat
					value = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.total_threat_ceiling
					compare = greater_than_or_equals
				}
			}
			soviet_collapse_maybe_show_union_unmade_super_event = yes
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_soviet_collapse_forced_progressive_release_pressure = yes
					check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = 0 compare = greater_than }
				}
				soviet_collapse_fire_progressive_release_event = yes
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_progressive_release_candidate_count value = 0 compare = greater_than }
				}
				random_list = {
					seed = random
					soviet_collapse_progressive_release_weight = { soviet_collapse_fire_progressive_release_event = yes }
					soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_weight = { soviet_collapse_register_progressive_release_miss = yes }
				}
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_candidate_weight_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
				set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_miss_reduction = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
			}
			else = {
				soviet_collapse_retain_progressive_release_pressure_without_candidate = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_release_first_year_backlog_republics = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_months_active
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.high_chaos_backlog_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.high_chaos_backlog_breakaway_floor
				compare = less_than
			}
		}
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
