		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_months_active
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.extreme_chaos_backlog_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.extreme_chaos_backlog_breakaway_floor
				compare = less_than
			}
		}
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes
		soviet_collapse_maybe_show_union_unmade_super_event = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_months_active
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_first_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_first_breakaway_floor
				compare = less_than
			}
		}
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_months_active
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_second_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_second_breakaway_floor
				compare = less_than
			}
		}
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_months_active
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_final_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_breakaway_count
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_final_breakaway_floor
				compare = less_than
			}
		}
		clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
		soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes
		soviet_collapse_maybe_show_union_unmade_super_event = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_months_active
				value = constant:soviet_collapse_release_mtth.first_year_backlog_final_gate
				compare = greater_than_or_equals
			}
			KAZ = { is_soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_candidate = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { KAZ = { exists = no } }
			release = KAZ
			KAZ = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes is_subject_of = SOV } }
			set_autonomy = { target = KAZ autonomy_state = autonomy_free }
			KAZ = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic }
		}
		KAZ = {
			soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = yes
			soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes
		}
		soviet_collapse_maybe_show_union_unmade_super_event = yes
	}
}

soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = {
	for_each_scope_loop = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
		save_event_target_as = soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_target
		if = {
			limit = { exists = no }
			SOV = { release = event_target:soviet_collapse_first_wave_release_target }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				is_subject_of = SOV
			}
			SOV = { set_autonomy = { target = PREV autonomy_state = autonomy_free } }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
		}
		if = {
			limit = { exists = yes }
			soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = yes
			soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_release_selected_progressive_republics = {
	for_each_scope_loop = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_progressive_release_selection
		save_event_target_as = soviet_collapse_progressive_loop_release_target
		if = {
			limit = { exists = no }
			SOV = { release = event_target:soviet_collapse_progressive_loop_release_target }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = yes
				is_subject_of = SOV
			}
			SOV = { set_autonomy = { target = PREV autonomy_state = autonomy_free } }
			set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
		}
		if = {
			limit = { exists = yes }
			soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = yes
			soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_release_initial_republics = {
	clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics

	soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_western_republic = yes
	soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_caucasus_republic = yes
	soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_central_asian_republic = yes
	soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes

	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 2 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 3 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
				AND = {
					has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes
					OR = {
						has_stability < constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.good_stability
						has_war_support < constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.good_war_support
					}
				}
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 3 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
				AND = {
					has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes
					has_stability < constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.min_stability
				}
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
			}
		}
		soviet_collapse_add_random_extra_first_wave_republic = yes
	}

	soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes

	if = {
		limit = { can_soviet_collapse_open_kazakhstan_first_wave = yes }
		if = {
			limit = { KAZ = { exists = no } }
			release = KAZ
			KAZ = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes is_subject_of = SOV } }
			set_autonomy = { target = KAZ autonomy_state = autonomy_free }
			KAZ = { set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic }
		}
	}

	if = {
		limit = {
			KAZ = {
				exists = yes
				has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic
			}
		}
		KAZ = { soviet_collapse_setup_breakaway_country = yes }
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_southern_breakaway_active = yes } }
			soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_central_asian_republic = yes
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 3 }
						has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
						has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
					}
				}
				soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_central_asian_republic = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
						has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
					}
				}
				soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_central_asian_republic = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
				}
				soviet_collapse_add_random_first_wave_central_asian_republic = yes
			}
			soviet_collapse_release_selected_first_wave_republics = yes
		}
	}

	if = { limit = { UKR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } UKR = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	if = { limit = { BLR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } BLR = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	if = { limit = { KAZ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } KAZ = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	if = { limit = { UZB = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } UZB = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	if = { limit = { KYR = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } KYR = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	if = { limit = { TAJ = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } TAJ = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	if = { limit = { TMS = { exists = yes has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_event_created_republic } } TMS = { soviet_collapse_load_event_created_focus_tree = yes } }
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_wave_active
}

soviet_collapse_mark_union_crisis_resolved_by_reconquest = {
	set_global_flag = soviet_collapse_resolved_by_reconquest
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_active
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_wave_active
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_pressure_initialized
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse_in_progress
	clr_global_flag = soviet_collapse_union_unmade_first_month_lock
	remove_ideas = soviet_collapse_union_crisis
	remove_ideas = soviet_collapse_emergency_union_authority
	remove_ideas = soviet_collapse_loyalist_officer_corps
	set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_crisis_resolved_by_reconquest
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_moscow_authority = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_military_obedience = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_max }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_republic_confidence = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_depot_vulnerability = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_foreign_appetite = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_league_cohesion = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_old_movement_pressure = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_total_collapse_threat = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_months_active = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_count = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_progressive_release_failed_months = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	set_variable = { soviet_collapse_opening_release_failed_months = constant:soviet_collapse_baseline.component_min }
	clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_first_wave_republics
	for_each_scope_loop = {
		array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
		if = {
			limit = { exists = yes }
			soviet_collapse_cleanup_resolved_breakaway_target = yes
		}
	}
	clear_array = global.soviet_collapse_breakaway_countries
	soviet_collapse_cleanup_terminal_collapse_missions = yes
	every_state = {
		limit = { has_state_flag = soviet_collapse_original_union_state }
		clr_state_flag = soviet_collapse_original_union_state
	}
}

	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_objectives value = soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap compare = greater_than } has_active_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_027_secure_the_grain_accounting_files } remove_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_027_secure_the_grain_accounting_files subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objectives = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_objectives value = soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap compare = greater_than } has_active_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_026_repair_the_western_telegraph_offices } remove_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_026_repair_the_western_telegraph_offices subtract_from_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objectives = 1 } }

}

soviet_collapse_queue_objective_refill = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_soviet_collapse_active = yes
			NOT = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse }
			NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_objective_refill_queued }
		}
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_objective_refill_queued
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_refill_delay_days = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.objective_refill_delay_days }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				country_event = {
					id = chaosx.nr5.128
					days = [OBJECTIVE_REFILL_DAYS]
				}
			}
			OBJECTIVE_REFILL_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_objective_refill_delay_days|.0]"
		}
	}
}

soviet_collapse_set_objective_refill_monthly_cap = {
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_refill_monthly_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_objective_refill_monthly_cap }
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_refill_monthly_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.calm_objective_refill_monthly_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes }
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes }
			is_soviet_collapse_calm_release_recovery_window = yes
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_refill_monthly_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.recovery_objective_refill_monthly_cap }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes
				has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 }
				has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 }
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_refill_monthly_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.crisis_objective_refill_monthly_cap }
	}
}

soviet_collapse_process_objective_refill = {
	soviet_collapse_set_objective_refill_monthly_cap = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = {
				var = soviet_collapse_monthly_objective_refills
				value = soviet_collapse_objective_refill_monthly_cap
				compare = less_than
			}
		}
		add_to_variable = { soviet_collapse_monthly_objective_refills = 1 }
		soviet_collapse_activate_opening_objectives = yes
	}
	else = {
		soviet_collapse_queue_objective_refill = yes
	}
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_refill_monthly_cap = 0 }
}

soviet_collapse_activate_opening_objectives = {
	soviet_collapse_update_center_pressure_state = yes
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_objective_activation_grace } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_objective_activation_grace
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_objective_activation_grace_days = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.objective_activation_grace_days }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				country_event = {
					id = chaosx.nr5.127
					days = [OBJECTIVE_GRACE_DAYS]
				}
			}
			OBJECTIVE_GRACE_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_objective_activation_grace_days|.0]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_objective_staging_started } }
		set_country_flag = soviet_collapse_opening_objective_staging_started
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_opening_objective_staging_days = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.opening_objective_staging_days }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				set_country_flag = {
					flag = soviet_collapse_opening_objective_staging
					days = [OPENING_OBJECTIVE_STAGING_DAYS]
				}
			}
			OPENING_OBJECTIVE_STAGING_DAYS = "[?soviet_collapse_opening_objective_staging_days|.0]"
		}
	}
	soviet_collapse_prune_invalid_active_soviet_objectives = yes
	soviet_collapse_count_active_soviet_objectives = yes
	set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.active_cap }
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes
				is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.calm_active_cap }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes }
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes }
			is_soviet_collapse_calm_release_recovery_window = yes
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.recovery_active_cap }
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_calm_strong_center_window = yes }
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_opening_strong_center_guard_window = yes }
			NOT = { is_soviet_collapse_calm_release_recovery_window = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_war_release_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_soviet_collapse_real_regional_cascade_pressure = yes }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 4 } }
			NOT = { has_global_flag = { flag = chaos_tier value = 5 } }
		}
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap = constant:soviet_collapse_soviet_objective.contested_active_cap }
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_global_flag = soviet_collapse_terminal_collapse }
		set_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objectives = soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap }
	}
	soviet_collapse_prune_surplus_active_soviet_objectives = yes

	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_objectives value = soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap compare = less_than } NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_mission_001_done } NOT = { has_active_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_001_confirm_the_emergency_chain_of_command } } activate_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_001_confirm_the_emergency_chain_of_command add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objectives = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_objectives value = soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap compare = less_than } NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_mission_002_done } NOT = { has_active_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_002_seal_the_first_circular } } activate_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_002_seal_the_first_circular add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objectives = 1 } }
	if = { limit = { check_variable = { var = soviet_collapse_active_objectives value = soviet_collapse_active_objective_cap compare = less_than } can_soviet_collapse_activate_opening_followup_objectives = yes NOT = { has_country_flag = soviet_collapse_mission_003_done } NOT = { has_active_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_003_guard_the_peoples_commissariats } } activate_mission = soviet_collapse_soviet_mission_003_guard_the_peoples_commissariats add_to_temp_variable = { soviet_collapse_active_objectives = 1 } }
